NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-14-2007 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 602. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR DEC-03-2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-08-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PACIFIC DENTAL ASSOCIATES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT PROVE THAT THE PLAINTIFF WAS FIRED PRIMARILY BASED ON ANY ATTEMPT TO COMPLY WITH THE BUSINESS AND PROFESSION CODE CHAPTER AND DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN LEGITIMATE REASONS THAT MOTIVATED ITS DECISION TO FIRE HER AND THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT SHE HAS BROUGHT FORWARD THAT COULD REASONABLY LEAD TO A CONCLUSION THAT IT WAS A PRETEXT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR # 4780

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ARTHUR SIEGEL, TEL. NO. 395-9335 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. BRIAN CARTER, TEL. NO. 989-4800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY PACIFIC DENTAL ASSOCIATES.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT PACIFIC DENTAL ASSOCIATES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT PROVE THAT THE PLAINTIFF WAS FIRED PRIMARILY BASED ON ANY ATTEMPT TO COMPLY WITH THE BUSINESS AND PROFESSION CODE CHAPTER AND DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN LEGITIMATE REASONS THAT MOTIVATED IT'S DECISION TO FIRE HER AND THERE'S NO EVIDENCE THAT SHE HAS BROUGHT FORWARD THAT COULD REASONABLY LEAD TO A CONCLUSION THAT IT WAS A PRETEXT.
